mapper.sql: id, symbol, name, status, score, reason, source, report_id, entered_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM trade_pool WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY score DESC, symbol ASC
SELECT FROM trade_pool ORDER BY status DESC, score DESC, symbol ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_pool WHERE status = 1
SELECT FROM trade_pool WHERE symbol = #{symbol} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_pool SET status = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_pool (symbol, name, status, score, reason, source, report_id, entered_at) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{name}, #{status}, #{score}, #{reason}, #{source}, #{reportId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), status = VALUES(status), score = VALUES(score), reason = VALUES(reason), source = VALUES(source), report_id = VALUES(report_id), entered_at = CASE WHEN VALUES(status) = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE entered_at END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
